project_type: Flutter 3.19.6 Android app with native C++ DSP pipeline via Oboe + OnnxRuntime + PyTorch Lite
test_framework: No automated unit tests for native code in CI; manual device tests in test_dnn_denoiser_dual.cpp
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/Audifon/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug (requires Android SDK which may not be present)
test_command: Static validation: verify CMake targets, includes, and code compiles logically
verification_instructions: 1. Verify build.gradle has pytorch_android:2.1.0 (not lite). 2. Verify CMakeLists.txt references libpytorch_jni.so and HAVE_PYTORCH define. 3. Verify dnn_denoiser.cpp uses torch::jit::load() and torch::jit::Module (not mobile::). 4. Verify audio_engine.cpp still loads the model correctly. 5. Verify packagingOptions use correct .so name.
setup_instructions: No Android SDK/NDK available in sandbox for full build. Changes are source-level refactoring validated by code review.
environment_constraints: Internet available (can download AAR for reference). No Android SDK/NDK installed in sandbox, so gradle build will not complete. Validation is AST-level: verify code correctness, header includes, link targets, and consistency across files.
contribution_requirements: Maintain existing coding style (extensive Spanish comments, LabVIEW SubVI doc pattern). Preserve the Bypass_Seguro contract. Keep ONNX mono path untouched.
key_patterns: HAVE_PYTORCH_LITE conditional compile flag, PIMPL pattern in DnnDenoiser, mobile::Module loaded via _load_for_mobile(), dummy forward [1,2,160] for shape validation, .ptl model file in assets, libpytorch_jni_lite.so in jniLibs/arm64-v8a/
directory_structure: android/app/build.gradle (Gradle deps), android/app/src/main/cpp/ (DSP C++ sources + CMakeLists.txt), android/app/src/main/cpp/dnn_denoiser/ (GTCRN wrapper + headers), android/app/src/main/cpp/dnn_denoiser/pytorch_lite/ (PyTorch headers extracted from AAR), android/app/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a/ (prebuilt .so), android/app/src/main/assets/dnn_denoiser/ (model files .onnx, .ptl)
